name: Call
description_short: Call.com provides virtual phone numbers and calling services via app, enabling users to make and receive calls, texts, and video calls without needing a second physical phone or SIM card.
description_long: Call.com is a telecommunications service that allows users to obtain additional phone numbers and manage communications entirely through a mobile or desktop application. The service launched with the primary goal of enabling users to maintain separate personal and professional identities without purchasing additional phones or SIM cards. Call.com offers virtual phone numbers available in select countries, with options for both mobile and landline numbers. Users can download the app on iOS, Android, Mac, PC, and Unix devices, and immediately begin making and receiving calls, SMS messages, and video calls. The company emphasizes privacy, affordability, and flexibility as core features of their platform. Call.com distinguishes itself through its focus on privacy controls and granular availability management—users can set different availability schedules for each number, instantly delete or regenerate numbers, and block unwanted callers and spam. The service includes free video calling and chat between Call.com users, affordable international calling rates using credits, and advanced call management features like call forwarding, voicemail personalization, and bulk SMS capabilities. The platform is marketed toward both personal and business users seeking to compartmentalize their communications. However, the service is fundamentally a virtual phone number and calling utility, not a financial services product. While it may help users protect personal information during transactions, it does not provide credit alternatives, emergency funding, or any payday-alternative lending. The company's website contains no mention of loans, credit products, credit scores, or any consumer finance services. Call.com is a telecommunications application with no bearing on credit access or short-term lending.
services: Virtual phone numbers (mobile and landline options)
Local number selection across multiple countries
Make and receive voice calls via app
Send and receive SMS text messages
Free video calling between Call.com users
Call forwarding to voicemail or another number
Spam call and text filtering and blocking
Remote call logging and availability management
Number transfer from existing phone numbers
International calling credits at low rates
pros: Free video calls and chat with other Call.com users included in service
Can instantly delete or generate new numbers to prevent unwanted contact
Advanced availability control allows setting schedules for each number independently
Local numbers available in select countries without requiring physical SIM cards
Works across multiple devices (phone, tablet, laptop, PC) without extra hardware
Bulk SMS capability to send one message to multiple contacts at once
Call and SMS forwarding with personalized voicemail for each number
Low-cost international calling rates using credits
cons: Limited to select countries for local number availability; international options unclear
Requires active app subscription and credits for international calls; pricing not transparently detailed on homepage
No mention of customer support channels, SLA guarantees, or service reliability terms on public-facing site
Unclear whether service works reliably for receiving calls from non-app users or legacy phone systems
No information about data privacy policy, data residency, or encryption standards for calls and messages
best_for: Remote workers and freelancers maintaining separate work and personal communication channels
Privacy-conscious individuals seeking to compartmentalize their phone numbers for dating, shopping, or online transactions
Business users and entrepreneurs managing multiple client or customer communication lines from one app
International callers seeking affordable rates for calls to specific countries
diagnosis: Call.com is a virtual phone number and telecommunications utility service with zero relevance to consumer finance, credit access, or payday alternatives. It was incorrectly categorized as a payday-alternative product and should be removed from CreditDoc's financial services database entirely, as it provides no lending, credit, or emergency funding services whatsoever.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
